title: microsorum dilatatum
intro: Microsorum dilatatum, also known as the fishbone fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Microsorum dilatatum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
